inquiry.description: You can designate the board to use as the product inquiry board.
inquiry.hint_secret: ℹ A board with the secret post feature enabled is recommended.
inquiry.go_to_board_edit_desc: Change detailed board settings such as secret post options, read/write permissions, and categories.
inquiry.hint_category: ℹ If you set up categories on the board, users can select a category when submitting an inquiry.
inquiry.go_to_posts_desc: View and respond to product inquiries submitted by customers. Add this board to the admin sidebar menu for quicker access.
inquiry.add_to_admin_menu_desc: Adds a posts management item for this board to the sidebar admin menu.
